title: Rodrigo Duterte Will Stand Trial for Crimes Against Humanity, Court Rules
summary_full: The International Criminal Court found there was enough evidence to try Rodrigo Duterte, the former Philippine president, for killings carried out during his crackdown on drugs.
summary_public: The International Criminal Court found there was enough evidence to try Rodrigo Duterte, the former Philippine president, for killings carried out during his crackdown on drugs.
